name: PlaneCircleIntersection
summary: Represents all possible cases of a Plane|Circle intersection event.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: No intersections. Either because radius is too small or because circle plane is parallel but not coincident with the intersection plane.

enum_values.name: Parallel
enum_values.summary: Circle and plane are planar but not coincident. Parallel indicates no intersection took place.

enum_values.name: Coincident
enum_values.summary: Circle and plane are co-planar, they intersect everywhere.
